date_notes: Review vote May 18 2022; resignation announced May 19.
title_en: Kenney receives 51.4% support in leadership review — below his own stated threshold — and resigns
title_fr: Kenney obtient 51,4 % de soutien lors de la révision de la direction — sous son propre seuil déclaré — et démissionne
description_en: Jason Kenney receives 51.4% support in the UCP leadership review — 17,638 yes votes, 16,660 no, from 34,298 mail-in ballots. Though technically sufficient to continue, Kenney states 'it clearly is not adequate support' and announces his resignation as party leader. He asks that a leadership election be scheduled as soon as possible. Danielle Smith issues a statement the same evening hinting at her leadership bid.
